arts.ttl: Norwich City in talks to name Arsenal U18s boss as first-team coach after Stoke City’s Pelach swoop

arts.ttl: Wilshere in advanced discussions over Norwich City coaching role
arts.sum: Norwich City are in advanced discussions with Arsenal to appoint Jack Wilshere to Johannes Hoff Thorup's first-team coaching staff.
